title: 3D Advanced Netherite
description: A resource pack for the mod Advanced Netherite
body:
# This resource pack is designed for the Minecraft mod "Advanced Netherite".

### Description:
This pack provides full PBR (Physically Based Rendering) support for all tools, armor, items, and blocks added by the Advanced Netherite mod. 

![The visual effects of all items, armor and blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8f0043e5d50b53a6ec6e6b7135cd86e2aad8362_0.webp)

Textures feature reflective properties and normal/height maps, delivering realistic depth and shine when used with supported shaders. All artwork is a direct 4x upscale (128x resolution) of the original mod assets—preserving the original style while enhancing visual fidelity, without adding unnecessary details or significantly impacting performance.

### Usage Requirement:
Shaders with parallax occlusion support are required to achieve the intended visual experience.

![The visual effects of netherite_gold_block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4d9c3702bbbef0bd7b0bda9ec314a42614fc235_0.webp)

### Compatibility:
Primarily developed and tested for Minecraft 1.20.1 with the corresponding mod version, but theoretically supports all existing mod versions. Compatibility with future mod updates depends on whether the mod author modifies texture names or file structures.

Adding this pack will not cause any issues, as I have not altered any of the mod’s original textures.

![No changes to any textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0be7b7a656ed73e8092699c8ca313e8cd6d9e3f.png)

### Credits & Thanks:
- Original Mod Author: [Autovw](https://modrinth.com/user/Autovw)
- Special thanks to Autovw for creating this excellent mod and providing his support.

### You can find his mod at the following locations:
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite)
- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-netherite)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Autovw/AdvancedNetherite)

### Legal:
- **As a user**, you may:
  - Download, use, share, and distribute this resource pack freely.
  - Adapt and modify it for any purpose.
- **As a modpack creator**, you may:
  - Include this resource pack in any mod packs.
- **Requirement for all users**:
  - Retain the original author’s attribution and license notice in all copies or modified versions of this resource pack.
